content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the e2e fixture builder addition (src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs, 1590 lines) plus additive dispatch/default-working-dir support on MockBrAdapter and MockBvAdapter. The fixture correctly materializes a Ready milestone, a 6-bead graph with parent-child and blocks dependencies, and wires mock dispatchers that reload .beads/issues.jsonl from disk before each call so external file rewrites are visible. Working-dir enforcement fails deterministically when callers forget to scope adapters to the workspace. Mock mutex usage is safe: lock critical sections are short and acquisition order is consistent across ProcessRunner::run and Debug::fmt. The comprehensive smoke test (list/show/create/close/dep-add/sync, dangling dependency errors, external rewrite, reopen) passes in 0.01s, well under the <1s target. All 15 test_support tests pass. Clippy errors observed in the workspace are pre-existing on master (confirmed by checking out master) and unrelated to this PR. No critical, high, medium, or low findings warrant amendments.

## Amendments

None.
